# `investments` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `Investment`

```prisma
model Investment {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId          String
  assetType       String
  assetName       String
  quantity        Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 4)
  buyPrice        Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currentPrice    Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalInvested   Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2) // Computed by trigger: quantity * buyPrice
  currentValue    Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2) // Computed by trigger: quantity * currentPrice
  profitLoss      Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2) // Computed by trigger: currentValue - totalInvested
  purchaseDate    DateTime
  lastUpdated     DateTime
  metadata        Json?
  clientRequestId String?   @unique
  // â”€â”€â”€ Extended fields (schema alignment with Dexie client) â”€â”€â”€
  broker             String?
  description        String?
  assetCurrency      String?
  baseCurrency       String?
  buyFxRate          Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 8)
  lastKnownFxRate    Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 8)
  totalInvestedNative Decimal? @db.Decimal(18, 2)
  currentValueNative Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 2)
  valuationVersion   Int?
  positionStatus     String?   @default("open") // open | closed
  closedAt           DateTime?
  closePrice         Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 2)
  closeFxRate        Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 8)
  grossSaleValue     Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 2)
  netSaleValue       Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 2)
  purchaseFees       Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 2)
  closingFees        Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 2)
  realizedProfitLoss Decimal?  @db.Decimal(18, 2)
  closeNotes         String?
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt       DateTime?
  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([assetType])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([positionStatus])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
